name: omni-endo-ai-mcp
description: MCP server exposing Glooko / Omnipod 5 diabetes data to an LLM for clinical audit.

scripts.test: node test/selftest.js && node test/resilience.test.js && node test/trend.test.js && node test/chart.test.js && node --no-warnings test/insulin.test.js && node --no-warnings test/extremes.test.js && node --no-warnings test/ranking.test.js && node --no-warnings test/units.test.js && node --no-warnings test/source_unit.test.js && node --no-warnings test/dayclass.test.js && node --no-warnings test/bolus_fields.test.js && node test/basal.test.js && node test/basal_orientation.test.js && node test/device.test.js && node test/dailyinsulin.test.js && node --no-warnings test/schema.test.js && node --no-warnings test/transport.test.js && node --no-warnings test/mcp-handshake.js && node --no-warnings test/sync.test.js && node --no-warnings test/coverage.test.js && node --no-warnings test/offline.test.js && node --no-warnings test/archive.test.js
